name: (Offenses Against Chastity) Concealment of Delivery of Child

sections.heading: Secs. 53-216 to 53-237. Offenses against chastity, generally.
Sec. 53-237a. Concealment of delivery: Class A misdemeanor.

body: (a) A person is guilty of concealment of delivery who intentionally conceals the delivery of any child, whether such child was delivered alive or dead.
(b) Concealment of delivery is a class A misdemeanor.
content.plainText:
(a) A person is guilty of concealment of delivery who intentionally conceals the delivery of any child, whether such child was delivered alive or dead.

(b) Concealment of delivery is a class A misdemeanor.

sections.heading: Secs. 53-238 to 53-241. Rape. Assault with intent to commit rape; with intent to carnally know female child. Examination for venereal disease of persons accused of violations of chapter.

body: Secs. 53-216 to 53-237. Offenses against chastity, generally. Sections 53-216 to 53-237 , inclusive, are repealed.
content.plainText: Secs. 53-216 to 53-237. Offenses against chastity, generally. Sections 53-216 to 53-237 , inclusive, are repealed.
